name: mycarrierpackets-api
description: Expert guidance for MyCarrierPackets API integration with TMS systems. Covers all 23 endpoints: carrier invitations (Intellivite), data retrieval, Assure Advantage monitoring, document retrieval, block/unblock, fraud detection, VIN verification, factoring, and OAuth2 authentication. Includes per-endpoint reference files generated from the official Swagger 2.0 spec.
